name: 女娲补天
zh: 远古时代，水神共工与火神祝融争斗，共工怒触不周山，天柱折断，天空出现大洞。女娲炼五色石补天，斩鳌足立四极，杀黑龙济冀州，积芦灰止淫水。天地终于恢复安宁。
en2: In ancient times, Gonggong smashed Mount Buzhou, breaking the pillar of heaven. Nuwa smelted five-colored stones to mend the sky and restored order to the world.

name: 后羿射日
zh: 上古时期，天上十日并出，大地焦灼。帝俊赐神弓于后羿，后羿引弓射落九日，只留一个照耀大地。从此天下重归太平。
en2: Ten suns appeared simultaneously, scorching the earth. The archer Hou Yi shot down nine, leaving one to light the world.

name: 大禹治水
zh: 大禹改堵为疏，历经十三年三过家门而不入，终于将洪水引入大海。天下人皆敬服，舜禅位于禹。
en2: Yu the Great changed flood control from damming to channeling. After thirteen years passing his home without entering, he guided the waters to the sea.

name: 盘古开天
zh: 天地混沌如鸡子，盘古生于其中。万八千岁后，阳清为天，阴浊为地。盘古死后身体化为天地万物。
en2: The universe was a cosmic egg. Pangu separated heaven and earth. When he died, his body became mountains, rivers, and stars.

name: 嫦娥奔月
zh: 后羿射日后获不死药，嫦娥情急吞下飞向月宫。从此独守广寒宫，只有玉兔相伴。每年八月十五后羿遥祭月中嫦娥。
en2: After Hou Yi received the elixir of immortality, Chang'e swallowed it and floated to the Moon Palace, with only a jade rabbit for company.

name: 精卫填海
zh: 炎帝之女溺亡于东海，化为精卫鸟，衔西山木石日复一日誓填东海，永不停息。
en2: The drowned daughter of Emperor Yan became the bird Jingwei, carrying twigs daily to fill the vast Eastern Sea, never stopping.

name: 牛郎织女
zh: 牛郎与织女相爱成婚。天帝发怒，王母用银簪划出银河分隔二人。每年七月初七喜鹊搭桥让他们相会。
en2: A cowherd and weaver fairy fell in love. The Queen Mother drew the Milky Way to separate them. Magpies form a bridge once a year for their reunion.

name: 白蛇传
zh: 白素贞是修炼千年的白蛇精，与许仙相恋。法海将她镇压在雷峰塔下，其子孝心感天终获自由。
en2: Bai Suzhen, a thousand-year-old snake spirit, loved the mortal Xu Xian. Imprisoned under Leifeng Pagoda, she was freed by her son's devotion.

name: 黄帝战蚩尤
zh: 黄帝与蚩尤大战于涿鹿。蚩尤呼风唤雨，黄帝请来旱魃，最终擒杀蚩尤统一华夏。
en2: The Yellow Emperor battled Chiyou at Zhuolu. After summoning the drought goddess, he defeated Chiyou and unified the land.

name: 夸父逐日
zh: 夸父与太阳赛跑，渴极饮干黄河渭水仍不够，终渴死。其手杖化为桃林，福泽后人。
en2: Kuafu raced the sun, drinking rivers dry. He died of thirst, and his staff became a peach forest for future generations.

name: 孟姜女哭长城
zh: 孟姜女万里寻夫到长城，得知丈夫已死。她放声痛哭，哭倒了长城八百里，感天动地。
en2: Lady Meng Jiang traveled to the Great Wall seeking her husband, only to learn he had died. Her weeping collapsed the wall for miles.

name: 哪吒闹海
zh: 哪吒在海边打死龙王三太子。龙王兴师问罪，哪吒削骨还父削肉还母。后莲花化身重生。
en2: Nezha killed the Dragon King's son. To protect his parents, he sacrificed himself and was reborn from a lotus flower.

name: 梁山伯与祝英台
zh: 祝英台女扮男装求学，与梁山伯结为知己。被迫嫁人后梁山伯病死，祝英台投坟殉情，化为蝴蝶双飞。
en2: Zhu Yingtai disguised as a man to study, befriending Liang Shanbo. Forced apart, they became butterflies in death.

name: 西游记
zh: 孙悟空大闹天宫后被压五行山下。后保护唐僧西天取经，历经九九八十一难终成正果。
en2: The Monkey King was imprisoned under a mountain. He later protected Xuanzang on a perilous journey to obtain Buddhist scriptures.

name: 伏羲画卦
zh: 伏羲观天象地理，仰观俯察，画出八卦，教人渔猎嫁娶，开创华夏文明。
en2: Fuxi observed nature and created the Eight Trigrams, teaching humanity fishing, hunting, and marriage — founding Chinese civilization.

name: 普罗米修斯盗火
zh: 普罗米修斯从奥林匹斯山偷取天火赐予人类。宙斯大怒将他锁在高加索山上，每日鹰啄其肝，永无止境。
en2: Prometheus stole fire from Olympus for humanity. Zeus chained him to a mountain where an eagle ate his liver daily, which regrew each night.

name: 阿佛洛狄忒诞生
zh: 当克洛诺斯砍伤父亲时，血与神力落入大海，泛起白色泡沫，爱与美的女神阿佛洛狄忒从海面翩然升起。
en2: When Kronos wounded Ouranos, divine blood fell into the sea. From the white foam, Aphrodite, goddess of love and beauty, arose.

name: 特洛伊战争
zh: 帕里斯拐走海伦引发十年战争。希腊联军用木马计攻破特洛伊城，结束了这场史诗般的战争。
en2: Paris abducted Helen, sparking a ten-year war. The Greeks finally defeated Troy with a wooden horse.

name: 奥德修斯历险
zh: 奥德修斯在特洛伊战后漂泊十年，历经独眼巨人、女巫、海妖塞壬等险阻终回故乡与妻团聚。
en2: After Troy, Odysseus wandered for ten years through Cyclops, sirens, and witches before returning home to his faithful wife.

name: 伊卡洛斯之翼
zh: 代达罗斯用蜡和羽毛为儿子伊卡洛斯造翅膀逃离克里特。伊卡洛斯飞得太高，蜡被太阳融化坠海而亡。
en2: Daedalus made wax wings for his son Icarus. Flying too close to the sun, the wax melted and Icarus fell into the sea.

name: 俄耳甫斯冥府寻妻
zh: 俄耳甫斯为救亡妻入冥府，以琴声感动冥王。但回头一望，妻子永远消失在黑暗中。
en2: Orpheus entered the underworld to rescue his wife, charming Hades with music. But he looked back, losing her forever.

name: 忒修斯与弥诺陶洛斯
zh: 忒修斯深入克里特迷宫斩杀牛头怪弥诺陶洛斯，凭阿里阿德涅的线团走出迷宫。
en2: Theseus entered the labyrinth and slew the Minotaur, escaping with Ariadne's thread.

name: 潘多拉魔盒
zh: 宙斯为惩罚人类创造潘多拉并赠予魔盒。潘多拉打开盒子释放出所有灾祸，唯有希望留在盒底。
en2: Zeus created Pandora with a box of evils. She opened it, releasing all suffering into the world — only Hope remained inside.

name: 珀尔修斯斩美杜莎
zh: 珀尔修斯用雅典娜的铜盾当镜子，避开美杜莎的石化目光，斩下蛇发女妖头颅。
en2: Perseus used Athena's shield as a mirror to avoid Medusa's petrifying gaze and beheaded the Gorgon.

name: 丢卡利翁大洪水
zh: 宙斯降大洪水毁灭人类。丢卡利翁与妻子乘方舟存活，投石造人重建世界。
en2: Zeus sent a great flood. Deucalion and Pyrrha survived in an ark and repopulated the earth by casting stones.

name: 奥西里斯与伊西斯
zh: 奥西里斯被弟弟赛特谋害分尸。妻子伊西斯走遍世界收集碎片使其复活，奥西里斯成为冥界之王。
en2: Osiris was murdered by Set. Isis gathered his scattered remains and resurrected him as lord of the underworld.

name: 拉神的太阳船
zh: 太阳神拉每日驾太阳船横渡天空，夜间穿过冥界与巨蛇阿波菲斯战斗，黎明重生。永恒循环。
en2: Ra sailed his solar barque across the sky each day, battling the serpent Apophis in the underworld each night before being reborn at dawn.

name: 荷鲁斯之眼
zh: 荷鲁斯为父报仇与赛特大战失去左眼。托特神治愈了他的眼睛，荷鲁斯之眼成为保护与治愈的象征。
en2: Horus fought Set to avenge his father, losing his left eye. Thoth healed it, making the Eye a symbol of protection and healing.

name: 阿努比斯称心
zh: 死者在冥界接受审判。阿努比斯将死者心脏放在天平上与真理之羽比重，心重者被怪兽吞噬。
en2: Anubis weighed the dead's heart against the feather of truth. Those whose hearts were heavy with sin were devoured by Ammit.

name: 斯芬克斯之谜
zh: 斯芬克斯出谜题：什么生物早上四条腿中午两条腿晚上三条腿？俄狄浦斯答出是人，斯芬克斯自毁。
en2: The Sphinx asked: what walks on four legs, two legs, then three? Oedipus answered: man. The Sphinx destroyed itself.

name: 赛特与混沌
zh: 赛特是混沌与沙漠之神，杀死兄弟奥西里斯夺取王位，最终被荷鲁斯击败流放。
en2: Set, god of chaos and desert, killed his brother Osiris. He was eventually defeated and exiled by Horus.

name: 天照大神
zh: 天照大神因弟弟暴行而躲入天岩户，世界陷入黑暗。众神设宴歌舞将她引出，光明重返人间。
en2: Amaterasu hid in a cave after her brother's violence, plunging the world into darkness. The gods lured her out with celebration.

name: 伊邪那岐与伊邪那美
zh: 伊邪那岐与伊邪那美用天沼矛搅动海水创造日本列岛。伊邪那美死后入黄泉，伊邪那岐追去却恐惧逃回。
en2: Izanagi and Izanami stirred the ocean to create Japan. When Izanami died, Izanagi chased her to the underworld but fled in horror.

name: 桃太郎
zh: 老夫妇在桃中发现男孩。桃太郎长大后率领狗、猴、鸡前往鬼岛讨伐恶鬼，凯旋归来。
en2: An old couple found a boy inside a peach. Momotaro grew up and defeated the demons of Onigashima with his animal companions.

name: 八岐大蛇
zh: 须佐之男用八桶酒醉倒八头大蛇八岐大蛇并将其斩杀，从蛇尾获得神剑天丛云。
en2: Susanoo tricked the eight-headed serpent Orochi with sake and slew it, finding the divine sword Kusanagi in its tail.

name: 竹取物语
en: The Tale of the Bamboo Cutter
zh: 老翁在竹中发现女婴辉夜姬。她长成绝世美女后拒绝所有求婚者，最终返回月宫，留下不死药。
en2: An old bamboo cutter found princess Kaguya-hime. She grew beautiful, rejected all suitors, and returned to the moon.

name: 浦岛太郎
zh: 渔夫浦岛太郎救了海龟被带去龙宫。住了三天回来发现已过三百年，打开宝盒瞬间白发苍苍。
en2: Fisherman Taro saved a turtle and visited the Dragon Palace. Three days there was 300 years on land — opening the box aged him instantly.

name: 雪女
zh: 暴风雪中出现的美丽雪女，用冰冷呼吸夺人性命。她爱上一个年轻樵夫，但秘密被发现后消失。
en2: The beautiful snow spirit kills with her icy breath. She fell in love with a woodcutter but vanished when her secret was revealed.

name: 富士山传说
zh: 辉夜姬返回月宫前留下不死药。天皇命人在最高山焚烧此药，山因此永远冒烟，名为不死山。
en2: Before Kaguya-hime returned to the moon, she left an elixir. The emperor burned it on the highest peak, giving Mount Fuji its eternal smoke.

name: 诸神黄昏
zh: 世界末日之战。巨狼吞噬太阳，世界之蛇升起。诸神与巨人同归于尽，世界在火与洪水中毁灭后重生。
en2: The final battle. The wolf swallows the sun, the world serpent rises. Gods and giants perish, the world burns and floods before rebirth.

name: 世界树
zh: 世界树尤克特拉希尔连接九大世界。鹰栖于顶端，恶龙尼德霍格啃噬根部，松鼠传递纷争。
en2: Yggdrasil connects nine worlds. An eagle sits on top, Nidhogg gnaws its roots, and a squirrel carries insults between them.

name: 托尔战巨蛇
zh: 雷神托尔多次与环绕世界的巨蛇耶梦加得交锋。在诸神黄昏中两者同归于尽。
en2: Thor battled the World Serpent multiple times. In Ragnarok, they destroyed each other.

name: 洛基的诡计
zh: 洛基是诡计之神。他导致光明之神巴德尔之死，最终被锁在岩石上受蛇毒滴面之苦。
en2: Loki caused the death of Baldur the Beautiful. Bound to a rock with venom dripping on his face, his writhing causes earthquakes.

name: 奥丁求智慧
zh: 奥丁为获得智慧，将自己倒挂在世界树上九天九夜，并挖出一只眼睛投入智慧之泉。
en2: Odin hung from Yggdrasil for nine days and sacrificed an eye to the Well of Wisdom, gaining knowledge of the runes.

name: 芬里尔巨狼
zh: 巨狼芬里尔是洛基之子。诸神用矮人锻造的魔锁束缚他。诸神黄昏时他挣脱束缚吞噬奥丁。
en2: Fenrir, Loki's son, was bound by a magical chain forged by dwarves. At Ragnarok, he broke free and devoured Odin.

name: 搅拌乳海
zh: 天神与阿修罗合力搅拌乳海以获取不死甘露。巨蛇为绳，曼陀罗山为杵，搅出毒药、宝物和甘露。
en2: Gods and demons churned the cosmic ocean using a serpent and mountain, producing poison, treasures, and the elixir of immortality.

name: 罗摩衍那
zh: 罗摩王子被流放，妻子悉多被魔王劫走。罗摩率猴王哈努曼大军攻打楞伽岛，战胜魔王救回妻子。
en2: Prince Rama was exiled and Sita kidnapped by demon king Ravana. With Hanuman's army, Rama defeated Ravana and rescued Sita.

name: 象头神迦尼萨
zh: 湿婆砍下误认的儿子头颅后悔恨不已，用大象头颅替换。迦尼萨成为智慧与好运之神。
en2: Shiva accidentally beheaded his son, then replaced his head with an elephant's. Ganesha became the beloved god of wisdom.

name: 摩诃婆罗多
zh: 般度族与俱卢族为王位在俱卢之野展开大战。克里希纳向阿周那传授薄伽梵歌的智慧。
en2: The Pandavas and Kauravas warred over a kingdom. Krishna taught Arjuna the wisdom of the Bhagavad Gita on the battlefield.

name: 毗湿奴十化身
zh: 毗湿奴有十大化身保护世界：鱼救大洪水，龟托起乳海，野猪救大地，人狮杀魔王。
en2: Vishnu incarnated ten times: as fish to save from flood, turtle to support the churning, boar to rescue earth, and more.

name: 哈努曼飞跃大海
zh: 猴神哈努曼纵身飞跃大海前往楞伽岛。一路战胜海中妖怪，找到悉多传达罗摩讯息。
en2: Hanuman leapt across the ocean to Lanka, defeating sea demons to find Sita and deliver Rama's message of hope.

name: 吉尔伽美什
zh: 乌鲁克王吉尔伽美什与恩奇都结为挚友。恩奇都死后，吉尔伽美什寻求永生，最终接受人终有一死。
en2: King Gilgamesh befriended Enkidu. After Enkidu's death, he sought immortality but learned to accept mortality.

name: 苏美尔大洪水
zh: 神灵降大洪水灭世。智慧神恩基警告祭司王造方舟，渡过七日七夜大水，方舟载生灵存续。
en2: The gods sent a flood. Enki warned a priest-king to build an ark. After seven days, the ark preserved all life.

name: 伊南娜下冥界
zh: 女神伊南娜下冥界拜访姐姐。经七道门每道门脱去一件衣物，赤裸死去。后被救活须找替身。
en2: Inanna descended to the underworld, stripping at each of seven gates. She died naked but was later revived — at a price.

name: 提亚马特
zh: 原初之龙提亚马特代表混沌之海。马杜克斩杀提亚马特，用她的身体创造天地万物。
en2: Marduk slew Tiamat, the primordial dragon of chaos, and used her body to create heaven and earth.

name: 檀君神话
zh: 天神之子桓雄下凡。一只熊吃蒜和艾草百日后化为女人，与桓雄生下檀君，建立古朝鲜。
en2: A bear became human after eating garlic for 100 days, then bore Dangun who founded Korea.

name: 春香传
zh: 春香与贵公子李梦龙相爱。春香被投狱，李梦龙高中后救出春香终得团圆。
en2: Chunhyang and nobleman Yi fell in love. She was imprisoned but Yi rescued her after passing the state exam.

name: 九尾狐
zh: 九尾狐化为美女引诱男子。有些版本中她渴望成为真正的人类，若能忍住百日便可化人。
en2: The nine-tailed fox transforms into a beautiful woman. Some versions tell of her yearning to become truly human.

name: 羽蛇神
zh: 羽蛇神是智慧与风之神，创造了人类并教授文明。他承诺有一天会从东方归来。
en2: Quetzalcoatl, the feathered serpent god of wisdom and wind, created humanity and promised to return from the east.

name: 五个太阳
zh: 阿兹特克人相信世界经历五个太阳纪。前四个被风、火、雨、洪水毁灭。我们活在第五个太阳纪。
en2: The Aztecs believed in five world ages. The first four were destroyed. We live in the Fifth Sun.

name: 双胞胎英雄
zh: 玛雅双胞胎英雄前往冥界与死神球赛，用智慧战胜死亡之主，最终化为太阳和月亮。
en2: The Maya Hero Twins played ball against the lords of death in the underworld, outwitting them to become the sun and moon.

name: 奥巴塔拉创世
zh: 至高神命奥巴塔拉从天降下，用沙土铺在原初之水上创造大地，放鸡刨出陆地。
en2: Obatala descended from heaven and spread sand on primordial waters. A chicken scratched the sand to form land.

name: 尚戈雷神
zh: 尚戈是约鲁巴的雷电之神，曾是奥约帝国第三任国王。他口吐雷火，死后化为风暴之神。
en2: Shango, Yoruba god of thunder and former king of Oyo, could breathe fire and became an immortal storm deity.

name: 阿南西蜘蛛
zh: 蜘蛛阿南西用诡计战胜比他强大的对手，收集了世界上所有的故事。
en2: Anansi the spider used tricks to defeat stronger opponents and collected all the world's stories.

name: 彩虹蛇
zh: 彩虹蛇是梦幻时代最重要的神灵。它在大地上移动时创造了河流、山谷和湖泊。
en2: The Rainbow Serpent created rivers, valleys, and lakes as it moved across the land during the Dreamtime.

name: 梦幻时代
zh: 梦幻时代是万物被创造的永恒时期。祖先灵魂在大地上旅行，歌唱世界使之成形。
en2: The Dreamtime is when ancestral spirits traveled the land, singing the world into existence.

name: 图皮大洪水
zh: 创世神因人类堕落而降大洪水。一对兄妹爬上棕榈树幸存，重新繁衍人类。
en2: God sent a flood. A brother and sister survived by climbing a palm tree and repopulated the world.

name: 粉红海豚
zh: 亚马逊河的粉红海豚在满月之夜变成英俊白衣男子，来到河边村庄引诱年轻女子。
en2: The pink river dolphin transforms into a handsome man at full moon, seducing young women in riverside villages.

name: 印提太阳神
zh: 印加太阳神印提派儿女建立库斯科，开创印加帝国。太阳节至今仍是秘鲁最盛大的庆典。
en2: Inti sent his children to found Cusco and the Inca Empire. The Festival of the Sun remains Peru's grandest celebration.

name: 维拉科查创世
zh: 维拉科查从的的喀喀湖中升起，创造太阳月亮星辰。用泥土造人，不满意的用洪水毁灭后重新创造。
en2: Viracocha rose from Lake Titicaca, creating sun, moon, and stars. He destroyed failed creations with floods and started anew.

name: 图安麦卡里尔
zh: 图安经历多次转世——从人变鹿变鹰变鱼再变人，见证了爱尔兰所有入侵。
en2: Tuan lived through multiple lives — man, deer, eagle, salmon, man — witnessing every invasion of Ireland.

name: 库丘林
zh: 库丘林是爱尔兰最伟大的英雄。七岁杀死猛犬，战斗时变身狂暴形态，以一人之力守卫阿尔斯特。
en2: Cu Chulainn, Ireland's greatest hero, killed a hound at age seven. His battle frenzy transformed him into a fearsome warrior.

name: 利尔的孩子们
zh: 国王利尔的四个孩子被继母诅咒变成天鹅九百年。漂泊三处湖泊后恢复人形时已白发苍苍。
en2: King Lir's children were cursed into swans for 900 years. When freed, they had aged into frail ancients.

name: 芭芭雅嘎
zh: 芭芭雅嘎住在鸡腿上的小屋里，是可怕的老巫婆。但她有时也帮助勇敢善良的年轻人。
en2: Baba Yaga lives in a hut on chicken legs. A fearsome witch, she sometimes helps the brave and kind.

name: 火鸟
zh: 火鸟是光芒四射的魔法鸟。伊万王子捡到金羽踏上旅途，最终赢得公主和王国。
en2: The Firebird is a magical bird of light. Prince Ivan found its golden feather and won a princess and kingdom.

name: 瓦西丽莎
zh: 瓦西丽莎被赶去芭芭雅嘎处取火。靠母亲留下的魔法娃娃完成任务，带回魔火烧死恶人。
en2: Vasilisa was sent to Baba Yaga for fire. With her magical doll's help, she returned with enchanted flames that destroyed the wicked.

name: 毛伊钓岛
en: Maui Fishes Up the North Island
zh: 半神毛伊用祖母的魔法鱼钩从海底钓起一条巨鱼——那就是新西兰北岛。
en2: Demigod Maui used his grandmother's magical hook to fish up a giant fish from the ocean — the North Island.

name: 朗伊与帕帕
zh: 天父朗伊与地母帕帕紧紧相拥，孩子们困在黑暗中。森林之神塔尼将他们分开，光明照进世界。
en2: Sky Father and Earth Mother embraced tightly, trapping children in darkness. Tane separated them, bringing light.

name: 伊鲁扬卡斯
zh: 赫梯风暴之神与巨龙伊鲁扬卡斯战斗。第一次败北，第二次在人类帮助下终于战胜巨龙。
en2: The Hittite storm god fought dragon Illuyanka. Defeated first, he won the rematch with human help.

name: 戈尔迪之结
zh: 无人能解的戈尔迪之结——谁解开谁统治亚洲。亚历山大大帝一剑斩断。
en2: None could untie the Gordian Knot. Alexander the Great simply cut it with his sword.

name: 阿拉丁与神灯
zh: 穷少年阿拉丁进入魔窟取灯。灯中精灵助他赢得公主，魔法师夺灯后阿拉丁凭智慧夺回。
en2: Poor Aladdin found a magic lamp. The genie helped him win a princess. When a sorcerer stole the lamp, Aladdin outwitted him.

name: 辛巴达航海
zh: 辛巴达七次远航，遭遇巨鸟洛克、独眼巨人、磁力山、钻石谷等奇遇。
en2: Sinbad sailed seven voyages encountering the Roc, Cyclops, magnetic mountains, and diamond valleys.

name: 一千零一夜
zh: 谢赫拉扎德每夜讲一个故事留悬念。一千零一夜后国王爱上了她，她用故事拯救了自己的生命。
en2: Scheherazade told the king a story each night with a cliffhanger. After 1001 nights, the king fell in love.

name: 罗慕路斯与雷慕斯
zh: 双胞胎被遗弃在台伯河边，被母狼喂养长大。罗慕路斯杀死弟弟后建立了罗马城。
en2: Twins abandoned by the Tiber were raised by a she-wolf. Romulus killed Remus and founded Rome.

name: 匹诺曹
zh: 老木匠造了木偶匹诺曹。他渴望成为真正的孩子，经历冒险后学会诚实善良，仙女将他变成真人。
en2: Gepetto carved a puppet who dreamed of being real. After learning honesty and kindness, the fairy made Pinocchio a real boy.
